\section*{\normalsize 📈 Performance Analytics}  
\texttt{\textbf{Core Metrics (Nov 2024-Jan 2025)}}:  
\begin{itemize}  
\item \texttt{Spotify}: 37,977 peak listeners (Nov 2024), stabilizing at 24,778 (+8.1\% MoM recovery)  
\item \texttt{Last.fm}: 13-20\% MoM growth (608 → 729 listeners)  
\item \texttt{Pandora}: No measurable activity (critical gap)  
\end{itemize}  

\texttt{\textbf{Key Trends}}:  
\begin{itemize}  
\item 15-20\% post-release streaming declines indicate playlist dependency risk  
\item Weekend listening drops (-8\% Fri-Sun) align with club/DJ audience behavior  
\item Remix tracks outperform originals by 40\% in saves (112\% spike for "Dance All Night Remix")  
\end{itemize}  

\section*{\normalsize 🌍 Audience Development}  
\texttt{\textbf{Follower Growth}}:  
\begin{itemize}  
\item Instagram: 4,875 (+22\% since Jul 2024)  
\item Spotify: 4,109 (+17\% MoM) \textsuperscript{✧} 5:1 listener-to-follower conversion rate  
\end{itemize}  

\texttt{\textbf{Engagement Patterns}}:  
\begin{itemize}  
\item Instagram: Mid-afternoon peak engagement \textsuperscript{⌚}  
\item Spotify: Evening listening dominance (8-11 PM local)  
\item Untapped YouTube potential: 3 subscribers vs. 47-track catalog  
\end{itemize}  

\texttt{\textbf{Strategic Gaps}}:  
\begin{itemize}  
\item Missing geo-data (require Spotify for Artists access)  
\item CA/MX markets underutilized despite Latin fusion catalog  
\end{itemize}  

\section*{\normalsize 🎵 Release Impact Analysis}  
\texttt{\textbf{Top Performers}}:  
\begin{itemize}  
\item \texttt{"Breathless" (w/L25)}: 83\% streams from collaborator's audience  
\item \texttt{"Butterflies Remix"}: 40\% higher saves vs. original  
\end{itemize}  

\texttt{\textbf{Release Timing Insights}}:  
\begin{itemize}  
item Summer releases (Jun-Jul) sustain +18\% longer than fall drops  
\item Midweek launches (Tue-Wed) drive 23\% more playlist adds  
\end{itemize}  

\texttt{\textbf{Collaboration Strategy}}:  
\begin{itemize}  
\item Remix features deliver 25\% of Q4 2024 streams  
\item Recommendation: Shift 30\% remix efforts to originals  
\end{itemize}  

\section*{\normalsize 📱 Distribution \& Platform Strategy}  
\texttt{\textbf{Platform Report Card}}:  
\begin{itemize}  
\item \texttt{✅ Spotify}: Core revenue driver (tier-2 playlists secured)  
\item \texttt{⚠️ TikTok}: Zero presence despite dance-friendly catalog  
\item \texttt{🚫 YouTube}: No official uploads (missed DJ content opportunities)  
\end{itemize}  

\texttt{\textbf{Optimization Roadmap}}:  
\begin{itemize}  
\item Convert "Take Off That Noise" into TikTok challenge series  
\item Reformat extended mixes → YouTube Visualizer content (\$2k/mo budget)  
\item Submit to Latin playlists: \textit{Eléctrico Latino}, \textit{House del Barrio}  
\end{itemize}

\item Weakness: Undifferentiated in big-room techno space  
\end{itemize}  

\texttt{\textbf{Competitive Edge}}:

\end{itemize}

\item Netflix sync opportunities for Latin fusion tracks
